title: Why Apple’s (AAPL) AI Rollout Timeline Is Raising Fresh Questions
sentences: Why Apple’s (AAPL) AI Rollout Timeline Is Raising Fresh Questions Apple's AI rollout timeline is under renewed scrutiny from Evercore ISI due to potential delays in the Apple Intelligence 2.0 launch, initially expected in March.
Headwinds during testing phases and a focus on privacy are reportedly causing these postponements.
Despite these challenges, Evercore ISI maintains an Outperform rating on AAPL with a $330 price target, expecting a multi-phase AI release throughout the year.
